abilities.name: Battle Shout
abilities.description: Increases your attack power by 20 for 2 min.

abilities.name: Heroic Strike
abilities.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by X. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Charges an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: Wounds the target, causing them to bleed for X damage over 9 sec.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.description: Blasts nearby enemies for X damage and slows their attacks by 10% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Hamstring
abilities.description: Maims the enemy for 5 damage, slowing its movement by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.description: Enter a berserker rage, generating 20 rage. (Warrior talent)

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.description: Generates 10 rage at the cost of health.

abilities.name: Bloodthirst
abilities.description: Instantly attack in a blood frenzy for X. (Fury signature)

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.description: A defensive combat stance: you generate 30% more threat but deal and take 10% less damage. Cast again to leave the stance.

abilities.name: Mortal Strike
abilities.description: A vicious strike dealing weapon damage plus X. (Arms signature)

abilities.name: Overpower
abilities.description: Instant attack for weapon damage +5. Only usable after the target dodges. Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Shield Slam
abilities.description: Slam the target with your shield for X and massive threat. (Protection signature)

abilities.name: Sunder Armor
abilities.description: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by X per application. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.description: Taunts the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Whirlwind
abilities.description: Spin in a deadly arc, striking all nearby enemies for X. (Fury talent)

abilities.name: Commanding Shout
abilities.description: Increases your Stamina by 6 for 2 min.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Shout
abilities.description: Lets out a fearsome shout, reducing the attack power of all nearby enemies by 30 for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Execute
abilities.description: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing X damage. Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Slam
abilities.description: Slams the opponent for weapon damage plus X.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: A sweeping strike that hits all enemies in front of you for X damage.

abilities.name: Devotion Aura
abilities.description: Increases your armor by 40 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Holy Light
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Seal of Righteousness
abilities.description: Fills you with Holy power for 30 sec, causing each of your melee swings to deal 4 additional Holy damage. Unleash with Judgement.

abilities.name: Blessing of Might
abilities.description: Places a Blessing on a friendly target, increasing attack power by 15 for 5 min.

abilities.name: Judgement
abilities.description: Unleashes your active Seal upon the enemy, consuming it to deal its judgement damage.

abilities.name: Divine Protection
abilities.description: A holy shield absorbs 50 damage for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Hammer of Justice
abilities.description: Stuns the target for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Lay on Hands
abilities.description: A massive surge of healing: restores 250 health. 10 min cooldown.

abilities.name: Flash of Light
abilities.description: A quick, efficient flash of Light that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Exorcism
abilities.description: Banishes the wicked with Holy wrath, causing X Holy damage.

abilities.name: Retribution Aura
abilities.description: Surrounds you with holy energy for 30 min, dealing 5 Holy damage to any enemy that strikes you in melee.

abilities.name: Righteous Fury
abilities.description: Increases the threat generated by your Holy damage by 60% for 30 min. The tanking paladin's cornerstone.

abilities.name: Consecration
abilities.description: Consecrates the ground beneath you, searing nearby enemies for X Holy damage.

abilities.name: Raptor Strike
abilities.description: A strong melee attack that increases damage by 5. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Hawk
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the hawk, increasing attack power by 20 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Serpent Sting
abilities.description: Stings the target, dealing X Nature damage over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Arcane Shot
abilities.description: An instant shot that deals X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Concussive Shot
abilities.description: Dazes the target, slowing movement by 50% for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Monkey
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the monkey, increasing your dodge chance by 8% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Dismiss Pet
abilities.description: Releases your pet back to the wild.

abilities.name: Mongoose Bite
abilities.description: Counterattack after the target dodges for weapon damage plus 12. Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Revive Pet
abilities.description: Revives your dead pet and returns it to your side.

abilities.name: Tame Beast
abilities.description: Begins taming a beast to be your companion. It must be your level or lower and not an elite. Your pet follows you, attacks your enemies, and holds threat of its own. You may have one pet at a time.

abilities.name: Wing Clip
abilities.description: Inflicts a wound that slows the enemy by 40% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Cheetah
abilities.description: Take on the aspect of the cheetah, increasing movement speed by 30% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Aimed Shot
abilities.description: A carefully aimed shot that deals X damage.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.description: Rains arrows on the target area, dealing X damage to enemies caught in it.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.description: Increases your attack speed by 40% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Eviscerate
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point.

abilities.name: Garrote
abilities.description: Garrote the enemy, causing damage now and bleeding it for X over 18 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Sinister Strike
abilities.description: An instant strike for weapon damage plus X. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.description: Conceals you in the shadows: enemies barely notice you, but you move 50% slower. Attacking or taking damage breaks Stealth. Cast again to step out.

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: Backstab the target for 150% weapon damage plus X. Must be behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Gouge
abilities.description: Strikes the target, incapacitating it for 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Cheap Shot
abilities.description: Strike the target, stunning it for 4 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 2 combo points.

abilities.name: Evasion
abilities.description: Increases your dodge chance by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Sap
abilities.description: Incapacitates the target for 8 sec. Must be stealthed and out of combat. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Slice and Dice
abilities.description: Finishing move that increases melee attack speed by 30%. Lasts longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.description: Increases your movement speed by 70% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Crippling Poison
abilities.description: Strikes the target with a crippling poison, dealing {damage} Nature damage and slowing its movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Expose Armor
abilities.description: Finishing move that exposes the target, reducing its armor. More combo points spent build into a deeper cut.

abilities.name: Kidney Shot
abilities.description: Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts 1 sec longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: Ambush the target for 250% weapon damage plus X. Must be stealthed and behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.description: Finishing move that wounds the target, causing it to bleed for X over 16 sec.

abilities.name: Instant Poison
abilities.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 8 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.description: Vanish from sight, entering Stealth even in combat. You move 50% slower while hidden. Lasts up to 10 sec.

abilities.name: Adrenaline Rush
abilities.description: Your blood runs hot, instantly restoring 60 energy.

abilities.name: Blind
abilities.description: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Deadly Poison
abilities.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 14 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Lesser Heal
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Power Word: Fortitude
abilities.description: Increases the target's Stamina by 3 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description: Smites the enemy for X Holy damage.

abilities.name: Shadow Word: Pain
abilities.description: A word of darkness causes X Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Power Word: Shield
abilities.description: Shields the target, absorbing 48 damage for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Renew
abilities.description: Heals the target for X over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Mind Blast
abilities.description: Blasts the target's mind for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.description: A slow but powerful prayer that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Mind Flay
abilities.description: Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing X Shadow damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Flash Heal
abilities.description: A fast prayer that heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Healing Wave
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Lightning Bolt
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Rockbiter Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with the fury of stone: each swing deals 5 additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Earth Shock
abilities.description: Instantly shocks the target with concussive force for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Shield
abilities.description: Surrounds you with crackling lightning: melee attackers take 13 Nature damage, up to 3 charges and at most once every 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Flame Shock
abilities.description: Sears the target with fire for 25 damage plus X over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Flametongue Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with elemental fire: each swing deals 8 additional Fire damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Frostbrand Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your weapon with biting frost: each swing deals 8 additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Frost Shock
abilities.description: Instantly shocks the target with frost for X Frost damage and slows its movement by 50% for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Ghost Wolf
abilities.description: Turns you into a Ghost Wolf, increasing movement speed by 40%. Cast again to return to normal form.

abilities.name: Earthquake
abilities.description: Shakes the target area, battering enemies for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Stormstrike
abilities.description: Channels the storm through your weapon, instantly striking for weapon damage plus X.

abilities.name: Arcane Intellect
abilities.description: Increases Intellect by 2 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: Hurls a fiery ball that causes X Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Frost Armor
abilities.description: Encases you in frost, increasing armor by 30 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Conjure Water
abilities.description: Conjures 2 bottles of water, restoring mana when drunk. Higher ranks conjure purer water.

abilities.name: Frostbolt
abilities.description: Launches a bolt of frost, causing X Frost damage and slowing movement by 40%.

abilities.name: Conjure Food
abilities.description: Conjures 2 servings of bread, restoring health when eaten. Higher ranks conjure heartier fare.

abilities.name: Fire Blast
abilities.description: Blasts the enemy for X Fire damage. Instant.

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles
abilities.description: Launches Arcane Missiles at the enemy, causing X Arcane damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Polymorph
abilities.description: Transforms the enemy into a sheep for up to 15 sec. The sheep wanders and heals rapidly. Any damage breaks the effect. Beasts and humanoids only.

abilities.name: Frost Nova
abilities.description: Freezes all nearby enemies in place for up to 8 sec, dealing X Frost damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Explosion
abilities.description: A burst of Arcane energy hits all nearby enemies for X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Scorch
abilities.description: Scorches the enemy for X Fire damage. Quick to cast.

abilities.name: Flamestrike
abilities.description: Calls down a burst of flame at the target area, dealing X Fire damage to enemies caught in the blast.

abilities.name: Ice Barrier
abilities.description: Shields you in ice, absorbing 130 damage for 60 sec.

abilities.name: Pyroblast
abilities.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes X Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Demon Skin
abilities.description: Demonic skin increases your armor by 30 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Immolate
abilities.description: Burns the enemy for 11 Fire damage and an additional X over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Summon Imp
abilities.description: Summons an Imp under the command of the Warlock. The Imp hurls Firebolts at your enemies from afar. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Corruption
abilities.description: Corrupts the target, causing X Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Life Tap
abilities.description: Converts 30 health into 30 mana.

abilities.name: Curse of Agony
abilities.description: Curses the target with agony: X Shadow damage over 24 sec.

abilities.name: Summon Voidwalker
abilities.description: Summons a Voidwalker under the command of the Warlock. The Voidwalker is a sturdy demon that taunts your enemies and soaks up punishment. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Drain Life
abilities.description: Drains the target's life, transferring X health to you each second for 5 sec.

abilities.name: Summon Succubus
abilities.description: Summons a Succubus under the command of the Warlock. The Succubus is a fragile demon that strikes quickly and hits hard in melee. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Fear
abilities.description: Strikes terror into the enemy, leaving it cowering for up to 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Summon Felhunter
abilities.description: Summons a Felhunter under the command of the Warlock. The Felhunter harries enemies from range with Shadow Bite and excels at hunting spellcasters. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Searing Pain
abilities.description: Sears the enemy with agonizing fire for X Fire damage. Quick to cast.

abilities.name: Summon Felguard
abilities.description: Summons a Felguard under the command of the Warlock. The Felguard is a durable melee demon that wades into battle and holds its own. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Rain of Fire
abilities.description: Calls a rain of fire onto the target area, burning enemies for X Fire damage.

abilities.name: Summon Infernal
abilities.description: Binds an Infernal to your will — a hulking juggernaut with crushing melee and the deepest health and armor of any demon. A long cooldown gates its raw power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Shadowburn
abilities.description: Instantly blasts the target with Shadow Flame for X Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Summon Doomguard
abilities.description: Binds a Doomguard to your will — an elite demon that rains heavy Shadow damage from afar. A long cooldown gates its devastating power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X.

abilities.name: Mark of the Wild
abilities.description: Places the Mark of the Wild on a friendly target, increasing armor by 25 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Wrath
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of nature energy for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Moonfire
abilities.description: Burns the enemy with moonfire for X Arcane damage plus damage over time.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.description: Heals the target for X over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Thorns
abilities.description: Thorns sprout from the target: melee attackers take 3 Nature damage.

abilities.name: Entangling Roots
abilities.description: Roots the target in place for up to 12 sec.

abilities.name: Bear Charge
abilities.description: Charge an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Bear Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a bear: armor +65%, attack power +15, your attacks build rage and generate 30% more threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Roar
abilities.description: Demoralizes nearby enemies, reducing their attack power by 20 for 20 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Growl
abilities.description: Growls at the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: A mauling attack that increases melee damage by X and causes a high amount of threat. Activates on your next swing. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Claw
abilities.description: Claw the enemy for weapon damage plus X. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.description: Enter stealth while in Wolf Form, moving 50% slower. Cannot be used in combat.

abilities.name: Rake
abilities.description: A stealth opener that rakes the enemy for weapon damage plus X and causes bleeding damage over 9 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Wolf Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into a wolf: agility rises with your level, attack power +8 plus 2 per level, your attacks use energy and combo points, and you generate 29% less threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Ferocious Bite
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Regrowth
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for X and an additional amount over 21 sec.

abilities.name: Barkskin
abilities.description: Your skin hardens like bark, increasing armor by 150 for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: Stuns the target for 2 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.description: Generates 20 rage instantly. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Swipe
abilities.description: Swipe nearby enemies for X damage. Causes extra threat. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Travel Form
abilities.description: Instantly shift into a swift travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. You cannot use other abilities while shifted, but can shift in or out of combat, ideal for escaping.

abilities.name: Dash
abilities.description: Sprint forward, increasing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Faerie Fire
abilities.description: Decreases the target's armor by 35 for 40 sec.

abilities.name: Hibernate
abilities.description: Forces the target into a deep sleep for up to 8 sec. Any damage will awaken it.

abilities.name: Hurricane
abilities.description: Calls a hurricane onto the target area, battering enemies for X Nature damage.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: A stealth opener that stuns the target for 2 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Starfire
abilities.description: Calls down a bolt of stellar fire, causing X Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Insect Swarm
abilities.description: The enemy is swarmed by insects, taking X Nature damage over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Rip
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over 12 sec. Consumes combo points. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Tiger's Fury
abilities.description: Increases attack power by 40 for 6 sec. Wolf Form only.
